CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria. Skills: Adobe

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria. Skills: Adobe

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria. Skills: Adobe

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria. Skills: Adobe

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria. Skills: Adobe

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023 Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.

CHECK UP

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

Poster Verano de Locos Skills: Adobe, 3Ds Maxs

“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy. Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

text.v:
El cartel oficial de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria, tiene como objetivo estimular la creatividad de artistas y diseñadores de todo el mundo difundiendo la cultura cinematográfica entre la ciudadanía, así como fomentar la difusión de la imagen del certamen a nivel nacional e internacional.

​

Uno de los retos del Ayuntamiento de Soria es promover el feminismo en cada uno de los departamentos, aplicando la perspectiva de género en los diferentes proyectos con el fin de revertir los datos que apuntan a que las mujeres siguen sufriendo invisibilidad, discriminación y violencia machista. Para ello se ha implementado un plan integral que ayude a revisar el camino andado con la finalidad de mejorar las acciones.

​

Para el cartel de este proyecto, después de leer el brieging, con la idea de hacer un poster para los cortos de Soria, querían añadirle la idea del femenismo, con el fin de aplicar la perspectiva de género en los diferentes proyectos con el fin de revertir los datos que apuntan a que las mujeres siguen sufriendo invisibilidad, discriminación y violencia machista. Para ello se ha implementado un plan integral que ayude a revisar el camino andado con la finalidad de mejorar las acciones.

The smart solution to manage your health without complications

Check Up is a group project designed to help patients manage their health in a simple and organized way. The app brings together appointment booking, medical availability, and personal health records in one place. Users can create a profile, schedule visits by specialty, and securely access their medical history. Its goal is to reduce stress and give users better control over their health through a safe and easy digital experience.

text.v:
“Verano de Locos” (“Crazy Summer”) is a 3D digital art project with a futuristic, cyberpunk aesthetic. It features a metallic robot with abstract forms, using a color palette of purples and reds that convey intensity and energy.
Its pose, with hands on its head, reflects a sense of emotional overload and mental chaos. Through reflections and lighting, the piece creates a contrast between the coldness of the material and the emotional weight of the character, representing the complexity of my experiences.

25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria.

El cartel de la 25ª edición del Festival Internacional de Cortos Ciudad de Soria busca difundir la cultura cinematográfica incorporando la perspectiva de género para visibilizar a las mujeres y promover el feminismo. La idea surge de unir elementos cinematográficos como encuadres, iluminación y composición de póster con la figura femenina como eje visual, representando la igualdad y la visibilización, y creando una imagen clara y simbólica que conecta cine y compromiso social.

Concurso de carteles de 
Aste Nagusia 2023 – Imagen de Aste Nagusia 2023
Skills: Adobe

“Aste Nagusia” is a graphic design project inspired by Bilbao’s “Semana Grande,” the city’s most representative popular celebration and a key reference of its cultural and participatory identity. The main focus of the work is the poster design, where Marijaia, the symbol of the festival, is reinterpreted through geometric shapes and vibrant colors. This proposal aims to capture and convey the joy, energy, and festive spirit of Aste Nagusia through a contemporary visual language that combines tradition and creativity.
